name: Secret Futanari Mission
description: You are the best spy of the world, inside the most prestigious Secret Agency of the world. Your mission : Infiltrate Futanopolis, the Futanari Empire capital, to collect vital military and political informations as we think the Futanari Empire may prepare for a total war of Global Subjugation. But don't worry, you won't be alone for this mission, we'll assign you our best (and only) Futanari Spy to guide and protect you... What ? You think she MAY be a double agent ? Don't be silly, she's one of our most trusted element ! Anyway, good luck agent !
creator: Cedi_cc
